rawText:
```json
{
  "freshness_score": 4,
  "trust_score": 6,
  "conversion_score": 5,
  "design_age_estimate": "slightly_outdated",
  "summary": "The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local customers.",
  "issues": [
    {
      "id": "hero_image_quality",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Low-Resolution Hero Image",
      "what_observed": "The hero image on desktop appears pixelated and low resolution.",
      "why_problem": "A blurry image immediately signals a lack of professionalism and attention to detail. A customer searching for a reliable roofing service will likely assume the quality of the work will also be subpar.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "High-resolution, professionally shot image of a completed roofing project, optimized for web display (around 1920x600px).",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace the current hero image with a high-quality, professionally photographed image. Ensure the image is optimized for web use to reduce file size and improve loading speed."
    },
    {
      "id": "mobile_contact_hidden",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Hidden Mobile Contact Info",
      "what_observed": "On mobile, the phone number is not immediately visible above the fold and requires scrolling to find.",
      "why_problem": "Mobile users are often searching 'on the go' and need immediate access to contact information. Hiding the phone number creates friction and increases the likelihood they'll choose a competitor with easier access.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "Prominent, clickable phone number in the header of the mobile site, visible without scrolling. Consider a 'Call Now' button.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Implement a sticky header on mobile with a clearly visible and clickable phone number. Add a 'Call Now' button for one-tap dialing."
    },
    {
      "id": "outdated_color_palette",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Outdated Color Scheme",
      "what_observed": "The website uses a color scheme with dated blues and oranges.",
      "why_problem": "The color scheme feels visually old and doesn't inspire confidence. Modern, clean color palettes build trust and convey professionalism.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A modern color palette with 2-3 primary colors (e.g., shades of blue and gray, or a neutral base with a single accent color).",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Update the website's color scheme to a more modern and professional palette. Focus on clean, neutral colors with a single accent color for calls to action."
    },
    {
      "id": "generic_stock_photos",
      "severity": "minor",
      "title": "Generic Stock Photography",
      "what_observed": "The images appear to be generic stock photos rather than photos of actual projects.",
      "why_problem": "Stock photos lack authenticity and don't demonstrate the company's specific expertise or quality of work. Customers want to see real examples of the company's capabilities.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "High-quality photos of completed roofing projects in the Brisbane area, showcasing the company's workmanship.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace stock photos with original photos of completed projects. Include before-and-after shots to highlight the transformation."
    }
  ],
  "positive_observations": [
    "Clear navigation menu.",
    "Services are listed explicitly.",
    "Contact form is present."
  ],
  "redesign_priorities": ["1. Make phone number immediately visible on mobile", "2. Replace low-resolution hero image", "3. Update color scheme to a modern palette"],
  "confidence": 0.85
}
```

parsedJson.summary: The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local customers.

issues.title: Low-Resolution Hero Image
issues.what_observed: The hero image on desktop appears pixelated and low resolution.
issues.why_problem: A blurry image immediately signals a lack of professionalism and attention to detail. A customer searching for a reliable roofing service will likely assume the quality of the work will also be subpar.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: High-resolution, professionally shot image of a completed roofing project, optimized for web display (around 1920x600px).
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the current hero image with a high-quality, professionally photographed image. Ensure the image is optimized for web use to reduce file size and improve loading speed.

issues.title: Hidden Mobile Contact Info
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the phone number is not immediately visible above the fold and requires scrolling to find.
issues.why_problem: Mobile users are often searching 'on the go' and need immediate access to contact information. Hiding the phone number creates friction and increases the likelihood they'll choose a competitor with easier access.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Prominent, clickable phone number in the header of the mobile site, visible without scrolling. Consider a 'Call Now' button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Implement a sticky header on mobile with a clearly visible and clickable phone number. Add a 'Call Now' button for one-tap dialing.

issues.title: Outdated Color Scheme
issues.what_observed: The website uses a color scheme with dated blues and oranges.
issues.why_problem: The color scheme feels visually old and doesn't inspire confidence. Modern, clean color palettes build trust and convey professionalism.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A modern color palette with 2-3 primary colors (e.g., shades of blue and gray, or a neutral base with a single accent color).
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Update the website's color scheme to a more modern and professional palette. Focus on clean, neutral colors with a single accent color for calls to action.

issues.title: Generic Stock Photography
issues.what_observed: The images appear to be generic stock photos rather than photos of actual projects.
issues.why_problem: Stock photos lack authenticity and don't demonstrate the company's specific expertise or quality of work. Customers want to see real examples of the company's capabilities.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: High-quality photos of completed roofing projects in the Brisbane area, showcasing the company's workmanship.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace stock photos with original photos of completed projects. Include before-and-after shots to highlight the transformation.

redesign_priorities: 1. Make phone number immediately visible on mobile
3. Update color scheme to a modern palette
